zh-CN.name: 电瓶车
zh-CN.intro: 电瓶车是一种小巧的车，有两个轮子，用电就能跑。你可以骑着它去公园、去超市，又方便又好玩。

story.title: 🛵小电驴嘟嘟的一天
story.body: 一大早，主人把小电驴嘟嘟推出车库，太阳照得它亮闪闪的。主人骑上来，轻轻一拧把手，嘟嘟就安安静静地出发了。它经过公园，看见好多小朋友在滑滑梯；经过面包店，闻到甜甜的香味。红灯亮了，嘟嘟乖乖停下，等绿灯再走。送了主人上班，嘟嘟停在车棚下，看着白云慢慢飘。傍晚，主人回来了，嘟嘟载着主人回家。晚风吹在脸上，真舒服呀！回到家，主人给嘟嘟充上电，嘟嘟安安静静地休息，准备明天再出发。

knowledge.title: 电瓶车为什么很环保？
knowledge.body: 电瓶车用电，不会排出黑黑的尾气，空气更干净。它小小的，不容易堵车，停车也方便。骑电瓶车省钱又环保，真棒！

en.name: Electric Bike
en.intro: An electric bike is a small vehicle with two wheels. It runs on electricity. You can ride it to the park or the supermarket. It is convenient and fun!

story.title: 🛵 Little E-bike's Day
story.body: In the morning, the owner pushed the little e-bike out of the garage. The sunshine made it shine brightly. The owner got on, gently twisted the throttle, and the e-bike rolled quietly down the road. It passed a park where children were playing on the slide, and a bakery with a yummy smell. At the red light, the e-bike stopped patiently. After dropping the owner at work, it rested under a shelter, watching the clouds float by. In the evening, it carried the owner home. The evening breeze felt so nice. At home, the owner plugged it in to charge. The little e-bike rested quietly, ready for another day.

knowledge.title: Why are e-bikes good for the environment?
knowledge.body: E-bikes use electricity, so they don't produce dirty exhaust. The air stays cleaner. They are small, so they don't cause traffic jams and are easy to park. Riding an e-bike saves money and helps the Earth. How cool!
